subject: New client onboarding request for Acme Manufacturing

thread.body:
Hi team,

We want help setting up a cleaner onboarding triage flow for our client requests.

Customer name: Acme Manufacturing
Implementation goal: Stand up an email-based onboarding triage and handoff workflow for our ops team.
Timeline: We want a pilot live by April 15.
Primary contact: Sarah Kim (sarah@acme.com)

Thanks,
Sarah
Internal note: Jane Doe owns the relationship. Priority is normal and the first rollout should stay conservative.
